case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE VS CANNON OTEY

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CANNON OTEY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANNON OTEY $210.00 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $251.00, DEFT FAILED TO FILE POLICE REPORT FOR THEFT OF CHECK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
